description: bridge ↔ channel-server 的 WebSocket JSON 信封合同。只管包装层（type/channel/source/content/...），消息内容本身的种类前缀由 irc_encoding 承载。定义 6 种 WSType 常量与 4 个 build_* 构造器、1 个 parse() 校验器。纯函数、无状态。

key_classes_functions.name: WSType
key_classes_functions.purpose: WS 消息类型常量集：REGISTER/REGISTERED/MESSAGE/COMMAND/EVENT/ACK；COMMAND 与 ACK 预留未用

key_classes_functions.name: build_register
key_classes_functions.purpose: 构造 bridge→cs 注册信封 {type,bridge_type,instance_id,capabilities}

key_classes_functions.name: build_message
key_classes_functions.purpose: 构造双向 message 信封 {type,channel,source,content,message_id?}

key_classes_functions.name: build_event
key_classes_functions.purpose: 构造 cs→bridge event 信封 {type,channel,event,data}

key_classes_functions.name: parse
key_classes_functions.purpose: 接受 str 或 dict，校验 type 字段属于已知集合；未知 type 抛 ValueError，非 str/dict 抛 TypeError
